violations.description: TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room doors noted not self closing for either main rooms or employee room.
CONTAMINATION BY EMPLOYEES (3 pts): Bare hand contact with ready to eat food noted not being avoided when plating food and garnishes.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in food prep areas.

TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in the employee toilet room downstairs. | TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room doors noted not self closing for either main rooms or employee room.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): A personal beverage was observed in an improper container. No lids on employee drinks.
